EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IRelationshipClass

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that return information about the relationship class, create relationships, relationship rules and get related objects.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("22B00693-8895-11D2-8A0D-006097AFF44E")]
public interface IRelationshipClass

Properties

BackwardPathLabel

The backward path label for the relationship class.

string BackwardPathLabel { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Cardinality

The cardinality for the relationship class.

esriRelCardinality Cardinality { get; }

Property Value

esriRelCardinality

The destination object class.

IObjectClass DestinationClass { get; }

IObjectClass

DestinationForeignKey

The relationship destination foreign Key.

string DestinationForeignKey { get; }

Property Value

string

Sample Snippet

DestinationPrimaryKey

The relationship destination primary Key.

string DestinationPrimaryKey { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

FeatureDataset

The feature dataset, if any, to which this relationship class belongs.

IFeatureDataset FeatureDataset { get; }

Property Value

IFeatureDataset

Sample Snippet

ForwardPathLabel

The forward path label for the relationship class.

string ForwardPathLabel { get; }

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsAttributed

Indicates if the relationships in this relationship class have attributes.

bool IsAttributed { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsComposite

Indicates if the relationship class represents a composite relationship in which the origin object class represents the composite object.

bool IsComposite { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Notification

The notification direction for the relationship class.

esriRelNotification Notification { get; }

Property Value

esriRelNotification

int

RelationshipRules

The relationship rules that apply to this relationship class.

IEnumRule RelationshipRules { get; }
